title: The Legends of Rocks, Roger, and Oden Surface
description: On pages 14–17, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Queen, Unknown person #14, Hyogoro, Momonosuke, Oden as The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.
scene: The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Stop it, all of you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Anyhowever, I understand

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If we go now, it will just be suicide!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can try again at a later date!! The next chance we get, we can...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We can not afford to wait another year!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We will never get another chance to do this discreetly!!

dialogue.speaker: Queen
dialogue.text: Our capture of UDon will be exposed!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And then Kaido will send his entire army to hunt down each and every Rebel!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We will not be able to steal any- more food, either!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I am sure you heard the reports of what is happening in Kuri!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The residents of Okobore put their trust in us to win this final battle...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They covered for us and their town was burnt to the ground!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Remember to

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: My wife was there!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Please let us go, Lord MOMONO- Suke!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Would you really command us to run away again and live the rest of our lives in shame!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: What will become of me, then!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: SURVIVE!! LIVE AND...

dialogue.speaker: Hyogoro
dialogue.text: together with Lady Hyogorori, you can-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Do not decide for me!!

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Your father was alone at first, too.

dialogue.speaker: Oden
dialogue.text: If we never met Lord Oden...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: None of us would have become Samural!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We were just a rag- Tag Group of Amateurs....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: And that is why...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: We must carry out our duty...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As Lord Oden's Samuel, until the bitter end.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Listen up, everyone....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There is a reason why this country has been isolated for hundreds of years!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And that reason is deeply connected to the Kozuki clan...

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: We must open Wano's borders!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Hey, hide your daughters!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Hide your wives!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Close up shop!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: During this era there was an infamous,

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: AND CHARISMATIC MAN IN THE FLOWER CAPITAL...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Hide the live- stock!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Hurry!! Here he comes!!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Kozuki Oden...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: an overbearing man....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Has return- Ed!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Ahh... how suffocat- ing...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: He failed to set sail again!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Hurry up and die already!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: This country is too cramped!!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden and the Old Era storyline with 45 dialogue beats. The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.
